publishedAbstract: - Pods are stuck in pending state when configuring LokiStack using noobaa as storageclass. ~~~ $ oc get pod-n openshfit-logging | grep-i pending logging-loki-compactor-0 0/1 Pending 0 5d19h logging-loki-index-gateway-0 0/1 Pending 0 5d19h logging-loki-ingester-0 0/1 Pending 0 5d19h logging-loki-querier-7687545c5-h9zwh 0/1 Pending 0 20h logging-loki-querier-7687545c5-rp9xd 0/1 Pending 0 20h ~~~
publishedTitle: LokiStack pods are stuck in a pending status when using Noobaa as block storage in RHOCP 4.
